SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-07 BY JAMES P. FLEMING
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2007 - JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BHASIN, RISHI RECOVER FROM APPELLANT VRANOVA, MIRIAM $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,630.00, *THE COURT FINDS THAT THE EVIDENCE OF DENIAL OF USE OF THE PREMISES WAS CONFLICTING AND THAT IN ANY CASE, APPELLANT WAIVED ANY CLAIM OF DENIAL OF USE BY FAILURE TO GIVE NOTICE OF TERMINATION OF TENANCY ON A TIMELY BASIS; SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:15am
Judge Pro Tem James P. Fleming, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record: Parties and witnesses are sworn. Appellant, Miriam Vranova, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Rishi Bhasin, appears in Pro Per. Mr. Bhasin presents his case in the narrative. Ms. Vranova presents her case in the narrative. Jenny Jan, speaks as a witness for Rishi Bhasin.
10:32am
